daily_goals: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am
go for a walk around Johnson Park from 8:30 am to 9:30 am, enjoying the fresh air and thinking about his mayoral campaign
head to Hobbs Café to read and have a cup of coffee from 10:00 am to 11:30 am, catching up on local news and maybe working on some campaign ideas
return home around noon for lunch with Jennifer, discussing their plans for the day and sharing stories

take a break and read a couple of chapters from a new book from 3:30 pm to 4:30 pm
attend a local community meeting at the town hall from 5:00 pm to 6:30 pm where he can share his vision for the town with prospective voters
return home for dinner with Jennifer around 6:45 pm

head to Hobbs Café to read and have a cup of coffee from 10:00 am to 11:30 am, catching up on local news and maybe working on some campaign ideas
return home around noon for lunch with Jennifer, discussing their plans for the day and sharing stories
spend some time in the afternoon preparing campaign materials and organizing his thoughts for upcoming discussions with neighbors, from 1:00 pm to 3:00 pm
take a break and read a couple of chapters from a new book from 3:30 pm to 4:30 pm
attend a local community meeting at the town hall from 5:00 pm to 6:30 pm where he can share his vision for the town with prospective voters
return home for dinner with Jennifer around 6:45 pm
